ui.title: SCF Action / Workflow Widget
ui.desc: Pending SCF financing tasks that require workflow review.

data.sql: SELECT C_MAIN_REF as "Reference", C_USER_ID as "Assignee", 'Financing Review' as "Task_Type", TO_CHAR(D_CREA_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "Created" FROM %EXIMTRX%.FAEF_MASTER WHERE C_TRX_STATUS = 'P' AND ROWNUM <= 5
